Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Enum Class PotVerticalAlignment

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PotVerticalAlignment>
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotVerticalAlignment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PotVerticalAlignment>, Constable
public enum PotVerticalAlignment extends Enum<PotVerticalAlignment>
Enumerates vertical alignment options for content within a shape or text box.

This enumeration provides a set of standard vertical alignment constants and serves as a bridge to the Apache POI VerticalAlignment type. It defines mappings for conversion between this library's representation and the underlying POI representation. The JUSTIFY member is provided for API compatibility but is internally mapped to POI's DISTRIBUTED alignment, as POI does not have a distinct JUSTIFY constant for vertical alignment.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    BOTTOM
    Aligns content to the bottom of the container.
    DISTRIBUTED
    Distributes content evenly across the vertical space of the container.
    JUSTIFY
    Justifies content vertically; maps to DISTRIBUTED in Apache POI.
    MIDDLE
    Centers content vertically within the container.
    TOP
    Aligns content to the top of the container.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • TOP

      public static final PotVerticalAlignment TOP
      Aligns content to the top of the container.

    • MIDDLE

      public static final PotVerticalAlignment MIDDLE
      Centers content vertically within the container.

    • BOTTOM

      public static final PotVerticalAlignment BOTTOM
      Aligns content to the bottom of the container.

    • JUSTIFY

      public static final PotVerticalAlignment JUSTIFY
      Justifies content vertically; maps to DISTRIBUTED in Apache POI.

      Apache POI's vertical alignment does not include a separate JUSTIFY constant. This value is provided for API consistency and is converted to VerticalAlignment.DISTRIBUTED when calling conversion methods.

    • DISTRIBUTED

      public static final PotVerticalAlignment DISTRIBUTED
      Distributes content evenly across the vertical space of the container.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static PotVerticalAlignment[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static PotVerticalAlignment valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • toPoiAlign

      public org.apache.poi.sl.usermodel.VerticalAlignment toPoiAlign()
      Converts this alignment to the equivalent Apache POI VerticalAlignment.

      Returns the corresponding POI vertical alignment constant. The JUSTIFY member is mapped to VerticalAlignment.DISTRIBUTED, as POI does not have a vertical JUSTIFY alignment. All other members have direct counterparts.

      Returns:
      the corresponding Apache POI VerticalAlignment constant, never null
      See Also:
      • VerticalAlignment

    • toPoiAlignment

      public org.apache.poi.sl.usermodel.VerticalAlignment toPoiAlignment()
      Converts this alignment to the equivalent Apache POI VerticalAlignment.

      This method is an alias for toPoiAlign(). It provides an alternative method name for consistency with other conversion patterns in the API.

      Returns:
      the corresponding Apache POI VerticalAlignment constant, never null
      See Also:
      • toPoiAlign()
      • VerticalAlignment

    • fromPoiAlign

      public static PotVerticalAlignment fromPoiAlign(org.apache.poi.sl.usermodel.VerticalAlignment poiAlign)
      Converts an Apache POI VerticalAlignment to the corresponding PotVerticalAlignment.

      Maps the given POI alignment constant to its equivalent in this enumeration. If the provided alignment is null, this method returns TOP as a default. Since POI does not have a JUSTIFY vertical alignment, only TOP, MIDDLE, BOTTOM, and DISTRIBUTED can be produced from a POI constant. Any unrecognized POI alignment value also defaults to TOP.

      Usage Example

      
 VerticalAlignment poiAlign = shape.getVerticalAlignment();
 PotVerticalAlignment potAlign = PotVerticalAlignment.fromPoiAlign(poiAlign);
      Parameters:
      poiAlign - the Apache POI vertical alignment to convert, may be null
      Returns:
      the corresponding PotVerticalAlignment, never null
      See Also:
      • VerticalAlignment
